what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that associates an attachment identifier with a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no additional body content
Contains id att-aa005d6c, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, target board://item-86fd74ad, and an ISO 8601 added timestamp
References an external board item via a board:// URI scheme
No code symbols or executable content present
standouts: The target uses a board://item-86fd74ad URI
The attachment_type is board_items, implying a link to a board entity rather than embedded content
conventions: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter metadata
External reference expressed as a URI
concerns: File contains only a pointer; its usefulness depends entirely on the external board item, which is not present here
notes: A minimal ledger entry that records attachment att-aa005d6c as pointing to board item item-86fd74ad in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or discussion does board item item-86fd74ad represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship (e.g., comment, file, vote)?
Is the attachment content stored separately or is this metadata the only record?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment targeting a board item; the file does exactly that as a metadata link, so purpose and actual content align.
intention_signals: It appears to create a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item so the relationship can be discovered and audited later.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the target board item.
contribution: Provides a stable attachment identifier and a timestamped association to a board item, supporting lookup and audit of channel-to-board references without embedding the target content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file that associates attachment att-aa005d6c with board item item-86fd74ad in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment references a specific board item and when that association was created.
